nodes.label: AI as creative jumpstarter for baseline ideas
nodes.label_negative: AI as sole creator replacing human ideation
nodes.grounding_span: use AI for small tasks to help jumpstart my creativity or come up with some baseline ideas

nodes.label: AI as image manipulation tool for precision and speed
nodes.label_negative: Manual image editing requiring hours of grunt work
nodes.grounding_span: quickly extend image backgrounds, change the color of clothing, remove elements from the background

nodes.label: AI as art director's executor
nodes.grounding_span: I'm the one telling it WHAT to do, and the AI gets to decide HOW it's going to do it

nodes.label: AI as threat to creative workforce
nodes.label_negative: AI as harmless tool that does not replace jobs
nodes.grounding_span: the workforce is going to be significantly reduced because less people and less time is needed

nodes.label: AI as omniskilled creative generalist
nodes.label_negative: AI as limited to narrow tasks
nodes.grounding_span: its capabilities will eventually be able to do everything a professional designer can do

nodes.label: Creative efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: gives me more time to focus on the creative

nodes.label: Creative control and authorship
nodes.grounding_span: I definitely feel like I'm art directing the AI

nodes.label: Job security and industry viability
nodes.grounding_span: my industry might be completely wiped out just as my career in this field is beginning

nodes.label: Excitement about AI's ability to realize imagination
nodes.grounding_span: it was really exciting to see how all of this imagery was created just by simply imagining something in my head

nodes.label: Fear of industry obsolescence
nodes.grounding_span: its quite scary that my industry might be completely wiped out

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as time-saving tool
nodes.grounding_span: Now I can quickly change images to be exactly how I need them, rather than spend hours tweaking

nodes.label: Art direction mindset — delegating execution while retaining vision
nodes.grounding_span: I'm the one telling it WHAT to do, and the AI gets to decide HOW it's going to do it

nodes.label: Future-oriented extrapolation — projecting current trends to extreme outcomes
nodes.grounding_span: its capabilities will eventually be able to do everything a professional designer can do
